description: await sql`SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = ${id}` — postgres.js safe tagged-template-literal API. The sql`…` tag function parameterizes interpolations automatically at the driver level; it is the canonical safe shape. Verifies the call-site regex's structural guard: since the regex anchors on `.methodName(` shape, a bare tagged-template without any method-name call-site naturally doesn't match. template-sql-checker must NOT emit.
